date_text: Thu, Apr 30th • 12:00 PM AEST - Sun, May 3rd • 10:00 PM AEST
description: Kaiju Brewing is storming back onto the rooftop at Hotel Sweeney’s — and they’re not coming quietly. Expect a wild lineup of bold, flavour-packed beers, including a few rare monsters that don’t often crawl out into the daylight. Kaiju never miss when it comes to delivering something loud, punchy, and just a little bit unhinged (in the best way possible). Whenever the crew from the brewery roll through, you know you’re in for a good time — big energy, big personalities, and beers that hit just as hard as their reputation suggests. This is one the whole Sweeney’s team genuinely look forward to every time. Great beer. Great people. Great chaos. Tap List:- - Golden Axe - Cerveza - KRISP - KRUSH - Pleazure Kruze - Metamorphosis - Aftermath - Dark Lager - Hef - Imp Stout - Cherry BOMG - Imperatrix
